THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF HUPPERT & HURABIELL AND AGAINST DEFENDANT H. SCOTT KILLGORE, IND. AND MILO COMMUNICATIONS CORPORATION. 100% OF FUNDS HELD BY SHERIFF OF SAN BENITO COUNTY COLLECTED FROM PROMO RADIO CORP. FOR THE BENEFIT OF H. SCOTT KILLGORE AND/OR MILO COMMUNICATIONS CORP AND/OR HUPPERT & HURABIELL ARE TO BE PAID OVER TO PLAINTIFF HUPPERT & HURABIELL, AND ALL FURTHER PAYMENTS DUE AFTER 7/30/03 FROM PROMO RADIO CORP. ON THE REMAINING NOTE PAYABLE TO MILO COMMUNICATIONS CORP. ARE TO BE PAID TO HUPPERT & HURABIELL CLIENTS' TRUST FUND ACCOUNT. AS EACH CHECK IS CLEARED IN THE TRUST ACCOUNT, HUPPERT & HURABIELL SHALL DISBURSE ONE HALF OF THE FUNDS TO ITSELF AND ONE HALF OF THE FUNDS BY CHECK TO MR. KILLGORE. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
